meaning: <希伯来>n.(前往巴勒斯坦或以色列的)犹太拓荒者
examples: In the Middle East, Israel's top military officer, Lieutenant General Dan Halutz, suddenly resigned today.
To their credit, at least the generals, including Halutz, showed up for the ceremony.
There have been calls for General Halutz to step down in the past.
